form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 12 at Ripon August 16 over 1600m, 16 len behind Suspended Sentence with 60.5kg at $126. On debut ran last in a small field at Brighton July 8 over 1400m, 19 len behind Snake Charmer carrying 60.5kg at $10. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Comes off a 45 day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 9 at this track on February 28 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Cool Molly with 57.5kg at $41. The race before that got back early 4th of 7 at this track on February 21 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Mister Moet carrying 61kg at $51. Expected to do much better.
